app_string_cond_panorama_story_s3^s3: PANORAMA: dawn entry / glass relay / checksum 01¥nbranch-alpha :: cond guard opens the archive gate¥nbranch-beta :: nested let packs a folded transcript¥nbranch-gamma :: while loop measures the lantern pulses¥nbranch-delta :: match observer records MARKER-ORBIT¥nbranch-epsilon :: literal database keeps every newline alive¥nbranch-zeta :: closing echo returns to the viewport
app_string_cond_panorama_fallback_s3^s3: fallback-frame :: spare branch for the cond renderer¥nfallback-frame :: keeps multiline shape when primary checks fail¥nfallback-frame :: still valid input for the viewer
app_string_cond_panorama_bad_decision_s3: cond decision did not select success banner
app_string_cond_panorama_unexpected_coun: unexpected i5 branch while preferring body
app_string_cond_panorama_unexpected_true: unexpected true branch while preferring body
app_string_cond_panorama_unexpected_fals: unexpected false branch while preferring body
